title: Legacy - Bow Tiers
description: Ever wanted more than one tier of bow?
body:
# Description:
Ever wanted more than one tier of bow?

well, with bow tiers, we allow players to get 3 types of bows:
- Normal Bows
- Strong Bows
- Long Bows

These bows also increase there damage depending on what tier, here is the list of materials able to be used on:
- Woods/Logs
- Stone
- Copper
- Iron
- Gold
- Diamond
- Netherite


## Notes:
This does not require a resource pack, as it doesn't have one.
